race.comment: BLUE TYPHOON (9) appreciated the step up to 1400m last start when she made ground to get up for third at Ballarat. Ready to peak after three runs back from a spell - just needs a bit of luck slotting in from a wide draw. THE LADY VENUS (13) made it three minor placings in a row when a distant third recently over today's journey at Horsham. Has had plenty of chances but from a good gate today she cannot be ruled out. ROUGHNUT (6) disappointed over 1200m at Echuca last start but is probably looking for this trip now. OUR ZINA (14) Tarzino filly from the stakes-winner Mourasana on debut. Coming along nicely leading into this, placing in most recently in a jump-out at Ararat. Worth thought.
